item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I don't get it. I mean, I understand what is happening - that's spelled out pretty clearly in the phone log - what confuses me is why they're doing this. What is the objective here?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The concept is admittedly novel, but I'm not a fan of a) how long the reveal takes and b) the reveal being stated near-outright.

Otherwise I did feel like a sleuth trying to push the bits and pieces into a coherent narrative prior to the phone records, which was nice.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It is not. Figures I miss something in my last proofreading. Fixed.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Nothing is wrong, everything is awesome! Upvoted.

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
notgull's being too modest— this was written on and off over the course of about a year, and we wrote about half of it, but he was the one who finally lit a fire under our asses to publish it.

This idea came to me back when I was playing Subnautica. That game gave me freakin' Thalassophobia, and I've been too scared to go past, like, 300 meters. I may have cried when my first leviathan ate me.

Hope y'all enjoy this.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
This is a collaborative work with Ihp. It's been a joy to develop this with them, thank you for doing this with me.

Thank you to Veied, AKFrost, Idrimi, BlueHour, man tortured by horses, PlaguePJP, Meska, LittleFieryOne for their critique. This one may be a bit of a format screw, as well as a bit of a thinker, but I hope it's still enjoyable.
